subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-02-17
subcodes.first_line: When the Blessed Perfection and his family were exiled from Persia, all along our way... In this Cause there is no relationship save the relationship of service
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @growth of the Cause, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @non-participation in politics
